assumptions.text:
System assumes access control: ACCESS CONTROL

Only Finance employees may access the payroll processing system.
System assumes configuration state: All payroll data is encrypted at rest and in transit.
System assumes process compliance: Only the VP of Finance can approve payroll runs.

System assumes access control: SYSTEM ACCESS

Production databases are not internet accessible.
System assumes identity posture: All administrative access requires multi-factor authentication.
System assumes access control: Database access is restricted to database administrators only.
System assumes access control: SSH access to production servers is restricted to the infrastructure team.

System assumes configuration state: AUDIT AND COMPLIANCE

All access to financial systems is logged and monitored.
System assumes governance compliance: Security reviews are conducted quarterly.
System assumes process compliance: All configuration changes must be approved by the security team.

System assumes configuration state: BACKUP AND RECOVERY

All financial data is backed up daily.
System assumes configuration state: Backup data is encrypted using AES-256.
System assumes governance compliance: Backups are tested monthly to ensure recoverability.
System assumes configuration state: Offsite backup storage is maintained at a separate geographic location.

System assumes network posture: NETWORK SECURITY

The finance network segment is isolated from other network segments.
System assumes network posture: All network traffic is inspected by the intrusion detection system.
System assumes access control: Security groups restrict access to only required ports and protocols.
